Bindings.Binding: if MDT_NPT and MDT_NPT.ToggleBeacon then MDT_NPT:ToggleBeacon() end
if MDT_NPT and MDT_NPT.NextPullManual then MDT_NPT:NextPullManual() end
if MDT_NPT and MDT_NPT.PrevPullManual then MDT_NPT:PrevPullManual() end
if MDT_NPT and MDT_NPT.ToggleBeaconLock then MDT_NPT:ToggleBeaconLock() end
if MDT_NPT and MDT_NPT.Settings and MDT_NPT.Settings.Open then MDT_NPT.Settings:Open() end
